notes: Phase 1 / Tier 14 list (Mogu'shan Vaults, Heart of Fear, Terrace of Endless Spring — Heroic versions). Tier token bosses: helm = Sha of Fear, shoulders = Lei Shi, chest = Grand Empress Shek'zeer, hands = Wind Lord Mel'jarak, legs = Amber-Shaper Un'sok. Icy Veins publishes one unified T14 hunter list — all three specs share it. Four-piece Yaungol Slayer's with Taoren, the Soul Burner. Draft compiled from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Hunter gear guides (T14 table).
